TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kabalelradhane, title = Kabalelradhane, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kabalelradhane} }

S.FORM: alang Kabalelradhane ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 130 buwan, 405 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 399 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 93%, Paywan 4%, Amis 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kabalelradhane hya' ga Karamemedesane. tay mkyahu' na Kabalelradhane hya' ga Wutai. tay 'llaw na Kabalelradhane hya' ga Labuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kabalelradhane ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 130 buwan, 405 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 399 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 93%, Paywan 4%, Amis 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kabalelradhane hya' ga Karamemedesane. tay mkyahu' na Kabalelradhane hya' ga Wutai. tay 'llaw na Kabalelradhane hya' ga Labuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kaβalelra*ħane ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βutaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan *%, amis~ɕ *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kaβalelra*ħane ħjaʔ ɣa karameme*es~ɕane. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaβalelra*ħane ħjaʔ ɣa wutai. taj ʔllaw na kaβalelra*ħane ħjaʔ ɣa laβuwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
